title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Bartolomeo, Colosseum Fighters, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #21, Unknown person #22 as the Colosseum block battle reaches a brutal finish, setting up the tournament’s next stage and sharpening Luffy’s path toward the fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Nothing in the ring could have possibly survived that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Every one of the top candidates to win it all has fallen!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: ...!! in the battle royale of B-block...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The winner, hailing from the kingdom of promise, is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The reason that section of the audience wasn't blown away...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Is that he was protecting them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If someone twists their fingers like this, they can make a barrier!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I ate the "Bari Bari No mi"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Elizabeth the second, is no longer able to fight!!! ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Eh... the winner of B-block is ... Dammit ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hehahaha!! You can all just go to hell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ewww!! Why did he have to win!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The "mera Mera No mi" will definitely be going to *that* person .....!!

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
